function.name: search_friends_markdown
function.description: Search current user friends and return a markdown table with username, phoneNumber and email.

keyWord.description: Keyword used for fuzzy search by nickname or username.

currUserId.description: Current user id in Mongo ObjectId format.

function.name: safe_path
function.description: Resolve and validate a user provided path inside a sandbox root and return normalized path metadata.

inputPath.description: User provided relative or absolute path to validate.

sandboxRoot.description: Sandbox root directory used as security boundary.

function.name: run_bash
function.description: Run a local bash command in a controlled working directory and return stdout/stderr/exitCode.

cwd.description: Working directory where command is executed.

function.name: run_read
function.description: Read a local text file and return file content or selected lines.

endLine.description: 1-based inclusive end line for partial reads.

function.name: run_write
function.description: Write text content to a local file, optionally with append mode.

append.description: If true, append to file instead of overwrite.
